SOSP 2025
The 31st Symposium on Operating Systems Principles

October 13 – 16, 2025 · Lotte Hotel World, Seoul, Republic of Korea

Online Registration: [Cvent Link]

Proceedings are available at: [ACM Digital Library]

Welcome to the SOSP 2025 Website

The annual ACM Symposium on Operating Systems Principles is the world's premier forum for researchers, developers, programmers, and teachers of computer systems technology. Academic and industrial participants present research and experience papers that cover the full range of theory and practice of computer systems software.

Where

Lotte Hotel World, Seoul, Republic of Korea

When

Monday to Thursday
October 13 – 16, 2025


Important Dates

Event Info Date Link
Conference October 14 - 16, 2025 Conference Site
Workshop October 13, 2025 Conference Site
Poster acceptance notification September 15, 2025 (previously September 8, 2025)
SRC notification September 15, 2025
Travel grant notification September 22, 2025 (previously September 15, 2025)
Deadline to register abstracts April 10, 2025; 23:59 PT HotCRP
Submission deadline (no extensions) April 17, 2025; 23:59 PT HotCRP
Reviews available for author response July 1, 2025
Author response due July 3, 2025
Author notification July 15, 2025
Artifact intent registration August 1, 2025 See sysartifacts for details
Artifact submission August 1, 2025 See sysartifacts for details
Workshop/Tutorial Proposals Due April 29, 2025 (previously April 15, 2025) Call For Workshops/Tutorials
Workshop/Tutorial Notification of Acceptance May 4, 2025 (previously April 20, 2025)
Childcare support Application August 15, 2025
SRC submission due August 15, 2025 SRC HotCRP
Camera ready due September 1, 2025 HotCRP
Early registration deadline September 8, 2025 (previously September 1, 2025) Cvent Link
Student scholarship and Travel grant application deadline September 1, 2025
Poster submission deadline September 7, 2025 (previously September 1, 2025) Poster HotCRP
